zh.lifeSummary: Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco是Reginald de Marisco和Marisco的女兒，出生。她和Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1124年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marisco
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Nicola, Canio, Dante, Dario, Domenic, Giacinto, Gino, Guido, Italo, Marcello, Romolo.
Italian (southern): topographic name from the Salentine dialect word marascu ‘mullein’ (from Latin verbascum).

nameMeanings.name: Agned
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Alvere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Francois, Michel.

variants.name: Lariviere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Normand, Fernand, Marcel, Adelard, Andre, Gaston, Philibert, Aime, Alcide, Alphonse, Antoine.
habitational name from any of numerous places in various parts of France named Larivière or La Rivière, from Old French riviere ‘river, shore’.

en.lifeSummary: Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco was born as the daughter of Reginald de Marisco and Marisco. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency. She died in 1124, in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco est née, fille de Reginald de Marisco et Marisco. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency. Elle est décédée en 1124, à Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco wurde, als Tochter von Reginald de Marisco und Marisco geboren. Sie hatte mit Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1124 in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco è nata il come figlia di Reginald de Marisco e Marisco. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency. Morì nel 1124, nel Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agned or Alvere - a de MariscoはReginald de MariscoとMariscoの娘として生まれた。彼女はHervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorencyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1124年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼモントモーエンシで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco(은)는 Reginald de Marisco(와)과 Marisco의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1124년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 몽모렌시에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco nasceu filha de Reginald de Marisco e Marisco. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency. Ela faleceu em 1124, em Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco родилась. Её родителей звали Reginald de Marisco и Marisco. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency. Она умерла в 1124 г. в местности монтморенси, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Agned or Alvere - a de Marisco nació como hija de Reginald de Marisco y Marisco. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Hervé de Montmorency, Seigneur de Montmorency. Murió en 1124, en Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia.
